prose: Aniline frontier-orbital HOMO–LUMO gap calculated via DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier standard, density-fitted) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1 (neutral singlet). Geometry: user-supplied aniline.xyz (14 atoms), single-point calculation. SCF converged in 9 cycles. HOMO = −5.554 eV, LUMO = −0.249 eV, gap = 5.305 eV. The result carries Koopmans-derived descriptors (vertical ionization potential 5.554 eV, vertical electron affinity 0.249 eV, electronegativity 2.901 eV, chemical hardness 2.652 eV, electrophilicity 1.587 eV). Integrity status: trustworthy (energy finite, SCF converged, schema compliant).
